es.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Esta politica aborda el cumplimiento de leyes de privacidad de mas de 20 jurisdicciones en todo el mundo, entre ellas el General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) de la Union Europea, el UK GDPR, la California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), la Republic Act No. 10173 (Filipinas), la Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) de Brasil, la Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) de Canada, la Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) de Japon, la Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) de Singapur y Tailandia, la Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) de Sudafrica y otras. Cada seccion explica sus derechos especificos conforme a la ley aplicable y como ejercerlos. PrTask nunca vende sus datos personales y ofrece mecanismos para el acceso, la correccion, la eliminacion y la portabilidad de datos cuando usted lo solicite.
es.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask no vende su informacion personal a terceros. PrTask tampoco comparte su informacion personal con terceros para publicidad conductual entre contextos. Si esta practica cambia en el futuro, PrTask proporcionara un enlace destacado de "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" y un enlace de "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information", tal como exige la California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) y la California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). PrTask reconoce las senales de Global Privacy Control (GPC) como una solicitud valida de exclusion.
es.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Utilizamos su informacion para operar la plataforma PrTask, procesar pagos de recompensas, mostrar perfiles publicos del leaderboard e insignias de logros, comunicarnos con usted sobre el estado de las tareas y los pagos, y prevenir fraudes o usos indebidos.

fil.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Tinutugunan ng patakarang ito ang pagsunod sa mga batas sa privacy mula sa mahigit 20 hurisdiksyon sa buong mundo, kabilang ang General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) ng European Union, UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Republic Act No. 10173 ng Pilipinas, Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) ng Brazil, Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) ng Canada, Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) ng Japan, Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) ng Singapore at Thailand, Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) ng South Africa, at iba pa. Inilalarawan ng bawat seksyon ang iyong mga partikular na karapatan sa ilalim ng naaangkop na batas at kung paano ito gamitin. Hindi kailanman ibinebenta ng PrTask ang iyong personal data at nagbibigay ito ng mga mekanismo para sa access, correction, deletion, at data portability kapag hiniling.
fil.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: Hindi ibinebenta ng PrTask ang iyong personal na impormasyon sa mga third party. Hindi rin ibinabahagi ng PrTask ang iyong personal na impormasyon sa mga third party para sa cross-context behavioral advertising. Kung magbago ang gawaing ito sa hinaharap, magbibigay ang PrTask ng malinaw na link na "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" at link na "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" ayon sa hinihingi ng California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) at California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). Kinikilala ng PrTask ang Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals bilang wastong opt-out request.
fil.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Ginagamit namin ang iyong impormasyon upang patakbuhin ang platform ng PrTask, iproseso ang mga bayad sa bounty, ipakita ang mga pampublikong profile sa leaderboard at mga achievement badge, makipag-ugnayan sa iyo tungkol sa status ng mga gawain at mga bayad, at maiwasan ang pandaraya o pang-aabuso.

fr.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Cette politique traite de la conformite aux lois sur la vie privee de plus de 20 juridictions dans le monde, notamment le General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) de l'Union europeenne, le UK GDPR, la California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), la Republic Act No. 10173 des Philippines, la Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) du Bresil, la Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) du Canada, l'Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) du Japon, la Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) de Singapour et de Thailande, la Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) d'Afrique du Sud, et d'autres encore. Chaque section presente vos droits specifiques en vertu de la loi applicable et la maniere de les exercer. PrTask ne vend jamais vos donnees personnelles et fournit, sur demande, des mecanismes d'acces, de rectification, de suppression et de portabilite des donnees.
fr.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask ne vend pas vos informations personnelles a des tiers. PrTask ne partage pas non plus vos informations personnelles avec des tiers a des fins de publicite comportementale intercontextuelle. Si cette pratique evolue a l'avenir, PrTask fournira un lien bien visible "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" ainsi qu'un lien "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information", comme l'exigent la California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) et la California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). PrTask reconnait les signaux Global Privacy Control (GPC) comme une demande valable d'opposition.
fr.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Nous utilisons vos informations pour exploiter la plateforme PrTask, traiter les paiements de primes, afficher les profils publics du leaderboard et les badges de reussite, communiquer avec vous au sujet de l'etat des taches et des paiements, et prevenir la fraude ou les abus.

hi.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: यह policy दुनिया भर की 20 से अधिक jurisdictions के privacy laws के अनुपालन को कवर करती है, जिनमें European Union का General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Republic Act No. 10173 (Philippines), Brazil का Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD), Canada का Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), Japan का Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI), Singapore और Thailand का Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA), South Africa का Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA), और अन्य शामिल हैं। प्रत्येक section लागू कानून के तहत आपके विशिष्ट अधिकारों और उन्हें उपयोग करने के तरीके को बताता है। PrTask कभी भी आपका personal data नहीं बेचता और request पर access, correction, deletion और data portability के लिए mechanisms प्रदान करता है।
hi.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask आपकी personal information को third parties को नहीं बेचता। PrTask आपकी personal information को cross-context behavioral advertising के लिए third parties के साथ share भी नहीं करता। यदि भविष्य में यह practice बदलती है, तो PrTask California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) और California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) की आवश्यकता के अनुसार एक प्रमुख "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" link और एक "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" link प्रदान करेगा। PrTask Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals को एक वैध opt-out request के रूप में मानता है।
hi.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: हम आपकी जानकारी का उपयोग PrTask platform चलाने, bounty payments process करने, public leaderboard profiles और achievement badges दिखाने, task status और payments के बारे में आपसे communication करने, और fraud या misuse को रोकने के लिए करते हैं।

id.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Kebijakan ini membahas kepatuhan terhadap undang-undang privasi dari lebih dari 20 yurisdiksi di seluruh dunia, termasuk General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Uni Eropa, UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Republic Act No. 10173 di Filipina, Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) Brasil, Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) Kanada, Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) Jepang, Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) Singapura dan Thailand, Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) Afrika Selatan, dan lainnya. Setiap bagian menjelaskan hak khusus Anda berdasarkan hukum yang berlaku serta cara menggunakannya. PrTask tidak pernah menjual data pribadi Anda dan menyediakan mekanisme untuk akses, koreksi, penghapusan, dan portabilitas data atas permintaan.
id.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask tidak menjual informasi pribadi Anda kepada pihak ketiga. PrTask juga tidak membagikan informasi pribadi Anda kepada pihak ketiga untuk iklan perilaku lintas konteks. Jika praktik ini berubah di masa depan, PrTask akan menyediakan tautan yang jelas bertuliskan "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" serta tautan "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" sebagaimana diwajibkan oleh California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) dan California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). PrTask menghormati sinyal Global Privacy Control (GPC) sebagai permintaan opt-out yang sah.
id.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Kami menggunakan informasi Anda untuk mengoperasikan platform PrTask, memproses pembayaran bounty, menampilkan profil leaderboard publik dan lencana pencapaian, berkomunikasi dengan Anda tentang status tugas dan pembayaran, serta mencegah penipuan atau penyalahgunaan.

it.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Questa politica affronta la conformita alle leggi sulla privacy di oltre 20 giurisdizioni nel mondo, tra cui il General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) dell'Unione europea, l'UK GDPR, la California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), la Republic Act No. 10173 delle Filippine, la Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) del Brasile, la Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) del Canada, l'Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) del Giappone, la Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) di Singapore e Thailandia, la Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) del Sudafrica e altre ancora. Ogni sezione descrive i tuoi diritti specifici ai sensi della legge applicabile e come esercitarli. PrTask non vende mai i tuoi dati personali e fornisce, su richiesta, meccanismi per l'accesso, la correzione, la cancellazione e la portabilita dei dati.
it.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask non vende le tue informazioni personali a terzi. PrTask non condivide nemmeno le tue informazioni personali con terzi per la pubblicita comportamentale cross-context. Se questa pratica cambiera in futuro, PrTask fornira un collegamento ben visibile "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" e un collegamento "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information", come richiesto dalla California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) e dalla California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). PrTask riconosce i segnali Global Privacy Control (GPC) come una valida richiesta di opt-out.
it.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Utilizziamo le tue informazioni per gestire la piattaforma PrTask, elaborare i pagamenti delle bounty, mostrare profili pubblici del leaderboard e badge di risultato, comunicare con te sullo stato delle attivita e dei pagamenti, e prevenire frodi o abusi.

ja.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: このポリシーは、European Union の General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)、UK GDPR、California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)、Philippines の Republic Act No. 10173、Brazil の Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD)、Canada の Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)、Japan の Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI)、Singapore と Thailand の Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA)、South Africa の Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) など、世界 20 を超える jurisdictions の privacy laws への準拠を扱っています。各 section では、適用される law に基づくあなたの具体的な rights と、その行使方法を説明しています。PrTask はあなたの personal data を決して販売せず、request に応じて data access、correction、deletion、portability の仕組みを提供します。
ja.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask は、あなたの personal information を third parties に販売しません。PrTask は、cross-context behavioral advertising のために third parties と personal information を共有することもありません。将来この practice が変更される場合、PrTask は California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) および California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) に従い、目立つ "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" link と "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" link を提供します。PrTask は Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals を有効な opt-out request として尊重します。
ja.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: 当社は、PrTask platform の運営、bounty payments の処理、public leaderboard profiles と achievement badges の表示、task status や payments に関する連絡、そして fraud や abuse の防止のために、あなたの情報を使用します。

ko.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: 이 정책은 European Union의 General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Philippines의 Republic Act No. 10173, Brazil의 Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD), Canada의 Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), Japan의 Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI), Singapore 및 Thailand의 Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA), South Africa의 Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) 등을 포함하여 전 세계 20개가 넘는 jurisdictions의 privacy laws 준수를 다룹니다. 각 section은 적용되는 law에 따른 귀하의 구체적인 rights와 이를 행사하는 방법을 설명합니다. PrTask는 귀하의 personal data를 결코 판매하지 않으며, 요청 시 data access, correction, deletion 및 portability를 위한 mechanisms를 제공합니다.
ko.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask는 귀하의 personal information을 third parties에게 판매하지 않습니다. PrTask는 cross-context behavioral advertising을 위해 귀하의 personal information을 third parties와 공유하지도 않습니다. 이 practice가 향후 변경되는 경우, PrTask는 California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) 및 California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)에 따라 눈에 띄는 "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" link와 "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" link를 제공합니다. PrTask는 Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals를 유효한 opt-out request로 인정합니다.
ko.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: 당사는 귀하의 정보를 PrTask platform 운영, bounty payments 처리, public leaderboard profiles 및 achievement badges 표시, task status와 payments에 관한 소통, 그리고 fraud 또는 abuse 방지를 위해 사용합니다.

nl.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Dit beleid behandelt naleving van privacywetgeving uit meer dan 20 rechtsgebieden wereldwijd, waaronder de General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) van de Europese Unie, de UK GDPR, de California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Republic Act No. 10173 van de Filipijnen, de Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) van Brazilie, de Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) van Canada, de Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) van Japan, de Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) van Singapore en Thailand, de Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) van Zuid-Afrika en meer. Elke sectie beschrijft uw specifieke rechten onder de toepasselijke wet en hoe u die kunt uitoefenen. PrTask verkoopt uw persoonsgegevens nooit en biedt op verzoek mechanismen voor toegang, correctie, verwijdering en dataportabiliteit.
nl.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask verkoopt uw persoonsgegevens niet aan derden. PrTask deelt uw persoonsgegevens ook niet met derden voor cross-context behavioral advertising. Als deze praktijk in de toekomst verandert, zal PrTask een opvallende link "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" en een link "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" aanbieden, zoals vereist door de California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) en de California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). PrTask erkent Global Privacy Control (GPC)-signalen als een geldig opt-outverzoek.
nl.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Wij gebruiken uw informatie om het PrTask-platform te exploiteren, bountybetalingen te verwerken, openbare leaderboardprofielen en achievement badges weer te geven, met u te communiceren over taakstatus en betalingen, en fraude of misbruik te voorkomen.

pt.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Esta politica trata da conformidade com leis de privacidade de mais de 20 jurisdicoes em todo o mundo, incluindo o General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) da Uniao Europeia, o UK GDPR, a California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), a Republic Act No. 10173 das Filipinas, a Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) do Brasil, a Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) do Canada, a Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) do Japao, a Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) de Singapura e da Tailandia, a Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) da Africa do Sul e outras. Cada secao descreve seus direitos especificos de acordo com a lei aplicavel e como exerce-los. O PrTask nunca vende seus dados pessoais e oferece mecanismos para acesso, correcao, exclusao e portabilidade de dados mediante solicitacao.
pt.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: O PrTask nao vende suas informacoes pessoais a terceiros. O PrTask tambem nao compartilha suas informacoes pessoais com terceiros para publicidade comportamental entre contextos. Se essa pratica mudar no futuro, o PrTask fornecera um link destacado "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" e um link "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information", conforme exigido pela California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) e pela California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). O PrTask reconhece os sinais de Global Privacy Control (GPC) como um pedido valido de opt-out.
pt.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Usamos suas informacoes para operar a plataforma PrTask, processar pagamentos de bounty, exibir perfis publicos no leaderboard e achievement badges, comunicar-nos com voce sobre status de tarefas e pagamentos, e prevenir fraude ou abuso.

ru.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Настоящая политика рассматривает соблюдение законов о конфиденциальности более чем в 20 юрисдикциях по всему миру, включая General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Европейского союза, UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Republic Act No. 10173 Филиппин, Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) Бразилии, Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) Канады, Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) Японии, Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) Сингапура и Таиланда, Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) Южной Африки и другие. В каждом разделе описаны ваши конкретные права по применимому закону и способы их реализации. PrTask никогда не продает ваши персональные данные и по запросу предоставляет механизмы для доступа, исправления, удаления и переносимости данных.
ru.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask не продает вашу персональную информацию третьим лицам. PrTask также не передает вашу персональную информацию третьим лицам для cross-context behavioral advertising. Если эта практика изменится в будущем, PrTask предоставит заметную ссылку "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" и ссылку "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information", как того требуют California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) и California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA). PrTask признает сигналы Global Privacy Control (GPC) как действительный запрос на отказ.
ru.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Мы используем вашу информацию для работы платформы PrTask, обработки bounty payments, отображения публичных профилей leaderboard и achievement badges, общения с вами по поводу статуса задач и платежей, а также для предотвращения мошенничества или злоупотреблений.

tr.PrivacyDescriptionParagraph2: Bu politika, Avrupa Birligi'nin General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) duzenlemesi, UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Filipinler'in Republic Act No. 10173 duzenlemesi, Brezilya'nin Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD) yasasi, Kanada'nin Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) yasasi, Japonya'nin Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI) yasasi, Singapur ve Tayland'in Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) duzenlemeleri, Guney Afrika'nin Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) yasasi ve digerleri dahil olmak uzere dunya capinda 20'den fazla yargi alanindaki privacy laws uyumlulugunu kapsar. Her section, uygulanabilir law kapsamindaki ozel rights'inizi ve bunlari nasil kullanacaginizi aciklar. PrTask kisisel verilerinizi asla satmaz ve talep uzerine data access, correction, deletion ve portability icin mechanisms saglar.
tr.PrivacyDoNotSellDescription: PrTask kisisel bilgilerinizi ucuncu taraflara satmaz. PrTask kisisel bilgilerinizi cross-context behavioral advertising amaciyla ucuncu taraflarla da paylasmaz. Bu practice gelecekte degisirse, PrTask California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) ve California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) gerektirdigi sekilde gozle gorulur bir "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" linki ve bir "Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information" linki saglayacaktir. PrTask Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals'i gecerli bir opt-out request olarak kabul eder.
tr.PrivacyInfoUsageDescription: Bilgilerinizi PrTask platformunu isletmek, bounty odemelerini islemek, herkese acik leaderboard profilleri ve achievement badges gostermek, gorev durumu ve odemeler hakkinda sizinle iletisim kurmak ve dolandiricilik ya da kotuye kullanimlari onlemek icin kullaniriz.
